prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM L11 2.3L DOHC 16V (LN2) inline-4** from the 1980s Pontiac Sunbird Turbo, retaining the Vega's original bellhousing pattern for direct bolt-on compatibility. Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.86 A/R, 60 trim) with a **Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm, 38mm orifice)** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve**. Custom **JE Pistons forged 8.5:1 compression** with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** and **ARP 2000 rod bolts** for 25 psi boost capability. **Holley Sniper EFI (2x4 throttle bodies)** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** and **Megasquirt MS3Pro ECU** for sequential fuel/timing control.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** with **McLeod twin-disc clutch (26-spline, 2400lb pressure plate)** and **Hurst Competition/Plus shifter**. **Strange Engineering 8.8" Ford 31-spline limited-slip differential** with **3.73:1 gear ratio** and **Moser Engineering 31-spline axles**. **Polyurethane motor mounts (Energy Suspension 3.1115)** and **solid aluminum transmission crossmember (Speedway Motors)** to eliminate drivetrain deflection.

Suspension overhaul: **QA1 double-adjustable coilovers (25-way rebound, 12-way compression)** with **Eibach ERS 1000lb/in springs** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**. **Global West tubular control arms (front, with poly bushings)** and **Hotchkis subframe connectors** to stiffen the unibody. **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers (12.19" rotors front, 11.75" rear)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1-Vega widebody kit** (fiberglass, 3" flares front/rear) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (AeroCatch mounts)** and **custom aluminum rear diffuser (integrated dual 3.5" exhaust exits)**. **Shine Auto Project side skirts** modified for the Vega's rocker profile, paired with **custom aluminum rear valence (CNC-machined, 5° diffuser angle)**.

Interior: **Recaro SRD (90s JDM-spec) front seats** with **Schroth 4-point harnesses** and **custom aluminum rear seat delete panel (riveted, powder-coated satin black)**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** on a **NRG quick-release hub**, paired with **Defi BF gauges (oil temp, boost, AFR)** in a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**. **Sound deadening via Kilmat 80mil butyl sheets** and **custom aluminum firewall insulation panel (0.063" thick)**.

Exterior details: **BBS RS-GT 15x8" wheels (ET15, 4x100 PCD)** with **Nitto NT01 tires (225/45R15 front, 245/40R15 rear)**. **Custom aluminum hood (vented, 2x NACA ducts)** with **carbon fiber hood pins (AeroCatch)**. **Hella Rallye 3000 headlights (H4, 100W)** with **custom Cibié Oscar LED taillights (sequential turn signals)**. **Full vinyl wrap (3M 2080 Satin Graphite Black)** with **custom matte red pinstriping (1/8" width, hand-painted)** and **Vega GT script decals (vinyl, 3M 1080 Gloss Red)** on the fenders.
